mapper.select: SELECT FAMILY_NO, PERSON_ID, FAM_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(FAM_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS FAM_TYPE_NAME, FAM_NAME, TO_CHAR(FAM_BORNDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS FAM_BORNDATE, FAM_IDCARD, FAM_FAMILY_PHONE, FAM_COMPANY_NAME, LIVE_YN, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, FAM_PERSON_ID, FAM_ADDRESS, GENDER, ADDRESS_POSTAL, ACTIVITY, FAM_EMAIL, FAM_EDUCATION, NATIONALITY, MOBILE_PHONE, WORK_PHONE, WELFARE_TYPE, APPLY_TYPE, UPDATE_FAMILY_NO, ESS_TYPE_CODE, EMERGENCY_LIAISON_OFFICE, FAM_PHONE, OCUPATION, AGE, NOTE, EARROR, CALLBACK FROM HR_FAMILY_APPLY WHERE FAMILY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO HR_FAMILY_APPLY ( FAMILY_NO, PERSON_ID, FAM_TYPE_CODE, FAM_NAME, FAM_BORNDATE, FAM_IDCARD, FAM_FAMILY_PHONE, FAM_COMPANY_NAME, LIVE_YN, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, FAM_PERSON_ID, FAM_ADDRESS, FAM_YINYANGLI, TAX_YN, GENDER, ADDRESS_POSTAL, FAM_EMAIL, FAM_EDUCATION, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, NATIONALITY, MOBILE_PHONE, WORK_PHONE, WELFARE_TYPE, APPLY_TYPE, UPDATE_FAMILY_NO, ESS_TYPE_CODE, EMERGENCY_LIAISON_OFFICE, FAM_PHONE, OCUPATION, AGE, NOTE, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{familyNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_DATE(#{famBorndate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
#{famIdcard, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famFamilyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famCompanyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{liveYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyContactYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famPersonId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famYinyangli, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressPostal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famEducation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isemergencyaddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationality, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobilePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{welfareType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{updateFamilyNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{essTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyLiaisonOffice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ocupation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{age, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
